name: Ferrari F12berlinetta
description: A masterpiece of Italian engineering. This F12 comes in Rosso Corsa with a Nero leather interior. Powered by a 6.3L V12 producing 730 HP. Full service history included.

name: Chevrolet Corvette Z06
description: The American supercar. Features the flat-plane crank LT6 V8 engine. Finished in Amplify Orange with the Z07 Performance Package and carbon fiber wheels.
